location: Found inside the Apostate Derelict, a ruined church at the northernmost point of Consecrated Snowfield, beyond the Wandering Mausoleum's path — sitting in front of an NPC inside the church.

source.name: Apostate Derelict (ground pickup inside ruined church)

tactics: The Apostate Derelict has its own Site of Grace right inside, so it's a safe respawn point once found.
Reaching Consecrated Snowfield first requires the Haligtree Secret Medallion (two halves) to activate the lift near Ordina, Liturgical Town.
Don't fight the NPC seated near the shield unless you intend to — she is not hostile by default.
lore: A shield of radiant silver trimmed in amber, once carried by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree — its dewdrop shape fueling rumors about her true origins.

builds.name: Strength/Intelligence hybrid tank
builds.why: Rare dual Strength+Intelligence scaling with added magic negation (89%), a strong pick for an INT-leaning melee build wanting a shield that also blocks sorcery.
